title: Workflow Outcome v1
description: Terminal outcome emitted when a workflow reaches a final state (completed, failed, or cancelled). Producer: Hymenium (single orchestration authority). Consumer: Canopy (ledger), Cap (operator UI), orchestration learning loop. Feeds failure analysis, retry policy tuning, and outcome history.

handoff_path.description: Path to the handoff markdown file that initiated this workflow.

failure_type.description: Failure category when terminal_status is 'failed' or 'cancelled'. Null when terminal_status is 'completed'. 'gate_violation': entry or exit gate condition failed. 'verification_failed': Output Verifier or Final Verifier rejected the output. 'stall_timeout': context budget exhausted or no progress within limits. 'operator_cancelled': explicit operator cancellation. 'audit_rejected': repair loop exhausted or auditor rejected output after max attempts. 'infrastructure_error': transient host or tool failure. 'unknown': failure cause could not be determined.

attempt_count.description: Total number of phase dispatches across the entire workflow lifetime, including retries and repair attempts.

phase_id.description: Phase identifier from the workflow template.

role.description: Runtime role that executed this phase.

status.description: Outcome of this phase in the route.

route_taken.description: Ordered trace of phase-role pairs that ran during this workflow, in execution order.

confidence.description: Output Verifier or Final Verifier confidence score (0.0–1.0). Omit when no verifier ran or confidence was not reported.

root_cause_layer.description: Layer where the root cause was identified when the workflow failed or required repair. Null when terminal_status is 'completed' and no repair was needed. 'spec': ambiguity or error in the handoff spec. 'decomposition': task packet compilation or decomposition error. 'execution': Worker execution failure. 'verification': verifier false-positive or misconfigured criteria. 'infrastructure': host tool or environment failure.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this workflow was created.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this workflow reached its terminal state.

runtime_identity.description: Optional runtime or session identity fields that explain the execution context for this outcome. Useful for retrospective route analysis when host, worktree, or session context determined which path was taken.

runtime_session_id.description: Execution-host runtime session identity when the producer can expose one.

project_root.description: Canonical repository or workspace root for the workflow scope.

worktree_id.description: Git worktree identifier when the workflow is scoped to one worktree.

host_ref.description: Execution host or adapter identity, for example 'volva:anthropic'.

workspace_id.description: Workspace or multi-repo scoping identifier when the workflow spans more than one project root.
